verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (GRP78/BiP) is canonically an ER-luminal chaperone, but has well-documented cell-surface display on tumor cells, stressed cells (UPR/ER stress), and during cell death. Cell-surface GRP78 is an active therapeutic target (anti-GRP78 antibodies, ADCs, CAR-T programs). The ecto-pool reaches the outer leaflet under stress/oncogenic transformation, qualifying as contextual via cell_state_induced.
